scripts.dev:free: sh -c 'for v in PORT FRONTEND_PORT; do p=$(grep -E "^$v=" .env 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2); [ -n "$p" ] && lsof -ti :$p | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done' || true
scripts.dev:both: npm run dev:free && concurrently "npm run dev" "npm run frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend --include=dev && npm run build --prefix frontend
